meta.source: Singapore Ministry of Manpower (MOM), CPF Board, common SG employer practices 2025

packages.name: Recruit Package
packages.lore: Standard entry package. Covers the essentials to get your unit operational.

slots.name: Medical Insurance
slots.desc: Group hospitalisation & surgical. MOM-mandated basic coverage.

slots.name: Annual Leave
slots.desc: 14 days per year (statutory minimum). Accrued monthly.

slots.name: CPF Contribution
slots.desc: Employer CPF contribution per MOM schedule. Mandatory.

slots.name: Transport Allowance
slots.desc: MRT/bus monthly pass subsidy.

packages.name: Professional Package
packages.lore: Competitive mid-career benefits. Retains experienced units and signals investment.

slots.name: Medical Insurance
slots.desc: Integrated Shield Plan with Rider. Includes specialist & dental add-on.

slots.name: Dental & Vision
slots.desc: $500/yr dental + spectacles claimable.

slots.name: Annual Leave
slots.desc: Enhanced leave. Sick leave: 14 days outpatient + 60 days hospitalisation.

slots.name: CPF Contribution
slots.desc: Standard employer CPF contribution.

slots.name: L&D Stipend
slots.desc: Annual learning budget. Usable on SkillsFuture-aligned courses.

slots.name: Flexible Work
slots.desc: 3 days office / 2 days WFH per week.

packages.name: Elite Package
packages.lore: Top-tier armour for high-value units. Maximises retention and performance stats.

slots.name: Medical Insurance
slots.desc: Full family medical with Integrated Shield Plan + Rider. Dental included.

slots.name: Dental & Vision
slots.desc: $1,000 combined dental & optical per year.

slots.name: Annual Leave
slots.desc: 21 days AL + enhanced sick leave + birthday leave.

slots.name: CPF + Supplementary
slots.desc: Standard CPF + voluntary additional employer top-up.

slots.name: Equity / RSU
slots.desc: Restricted Stock Units with 4-year vest, 1-year cliff.

slots.name: L&D Stipend
slots.desc: Covers conferences, certifications, external courses.

slots.name: Flexible Work
slots.desc: Full remote + WeWork co-working pass for office days.

slots.name: Wellness Allowance
slots.desc: Gym membership, mental health apps, health screenings.

packages.name: Commander Package
packages.lore: Reserved for senior commanders. Designed to retain your most powerful units.

slots.name: Medical Insurance
slots.desc: Executive full-coverage plan. Family included. No co-pay.

slots.name: Dental & Vision
slots.desc: No cap dental & optical. Private specialist access.

slots.name: Annual Leave
slots.desc: 25 days AL + unlimited sick days (trust-based policy).

slots.name: Equity / RSU
slots.desc: Significant equity stake. Performance-accelerated vesting.

slots.name: Performance Bonus
slots.desc: Annual performance bonus: 3–6 months salary depending on outcome.

slots.name: Executive Development
slots.desc: Executive MBA, board programmes, leadership coaching.

slots.name: Car Allowance
slots.desc: Monthly car allowance or chauffeured service.

slots.name: Wellness & Concierge
slots.desc: Premium gym, annual medical screening, personal concierge.
